title: agrostis gymnostyla
side_effects: Agrostis gymnostyla can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing gastrointestinal problems, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its potential toxicity. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts may also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and respiratory issues. In severe cases, improper use of Agrostis gymnostyla can cause more serious health complications, such as liver damage and kidney impairment. It is crucial to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any medicinal purposes.
